tasks.contracts:build:trellis-core: cargo run --manifest-path ../rust/Cargo.toml -p trellis-cli --bin trellis -- contracts build --source ../js/services/trellis/contracts/trellis_core.ts --out-manifest ../generated/contracts/manifests/trellis.core@v1.json --ts-out ../generated/js/sdks/trellis-core --package-name @trellis/sdk-trellis-core --runtime-source local --runtime-version 0.1.0 --runtime-repo-root ..
tasks.contracts:build:trellis-auth: cargo run --manifest-path ../rust/Cargo.toml -p trellis-cli --bin trellis -- contracts build --source ../js/services/trellis/contracts/trellis_auth.ts --out-manifest ../generated/contracts/manifests/trellis.auth@v1.json --ts-out ../generated/js/sdks/auth --package-name @trellis/sdk-auth --runtime-source local --runtime-version 0.1.0 --runtime-repo-root ..
tasks.contracts:verify: cargo run --manifest-path ../rust/Cargo.toml -p trellis-cli --bin trellis -- contracts verify --source ../js/services/trellis/contracts/trellis_core.ts && cargo run --manifest-path ../rust/Cargo.toml -p trellis-cli --bin trellis -- contracts verify --source ../js/services/trellis/contracts/trellis_auth.ts
tasks.sdk:platform: deno task contracts:build:trellis-core && deno task contracts:build:trellis-auth
tasks.sdk:platform:rust: cargo run --manifest-path ../rust/Cargo.toml -p trellis-cli --bin trellis -- contracts build --source ../js/services/trellis/contracts/trellis_core.ts --out-manifest ../generated/contracts/manifests/trellis.core@v1.json --rust-out ../generated/rust/sdks/trellis-core --crate-name trellis-sdk-trellis-core --runtime-source local --runtime-version 0.1.0 --runtime-repo-root .. && cargo run --manifest-path ../rust/Cargo.toml -p trellis-cli --bin trellis -- contracts build --source ../js/services/trellis/contracts/trellis_auth.ts --out-manifest ../generated/contracts/manifests/trellis.auth@v1.json --rust-out ../generated/rust/sdks/auth --crate-name trellis-sdk-auth --runtime-source local --runtime-version 0.1.0 --runtime-repo-root ..
tasks.contracts:pack: cargo run --manifest-path ../rust/Cargo.toml -p trellis-cli --bin trellis -- contracts pack --manifest ../generated/contracts/manifests/trellis.core@v1.json --manifest ../generated/contracts/manifests/trellis.auth@v1.json --output ../generated/contracts/dist/catalog.v1.json --contracts-out ../generated/contracts/dist/contracts
tasks.build:contracts: deno task sdk:platform && deno task contracts:verify && deno task contracts:pack
tasks.check: deno task build:contracts && deno check packages/trellis/index.ts packages/trellis-svelte/src/context.svelte.ts packages/trellis-svelte/src/state/auth.svelte.ts packages/trellis-svelte/src/state/nats.svelte.ts packages/trellis-svelte/src/state/trellis.svelte.ts services/trellis/main.ts
tasks.test:contracts: deno task build:contracts && deno test -A packages/contracts/source_emission_test.ts packages/contracts/catalog_conformance_test.ts packages/contracts/conformance_test.ts packages/contracts/tools/pack_test.ts services/trellis/contracts_store.test.ts services/trellis/permissions.test.ts
tasks.test:auth: deno task build:contracts && deno test -A packages/auth/conformance_test.ts packages/auth/session_auth_test.ts services/trellis
